delegations.task_goal: Implement App-only APP-239 real read-only task result display anchored on #239 and covering #238-#242.
delegations.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check
delegations.output_format: Implementation summary with changed paths, validation, risks, and boundary confirmation.
delegations.integration_target: APP-239 implementation commit and item-specific Loom carriers.

delegations.task_goal: Review APP-239 Core read task client and result projection for correctness, security, and privacy blockers.
delegations.validation_expectation: Identify P0/P1/P2 findings and targeted reproduction evidence.
delegations.output_format: Findings with file/line, impact, and minimal fix.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller fixes per-run detail failure handling, app_action none suppression, and smoke coverage.

delegations.task_goal: Review APP-239 desktop Task Thread behavior against App design checkpoint.
delegations.output_format: P0/P1/P2 UX findings with file/line and minimal fix.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller fixes selected-run rail binding, APP-239 read-only task filtering, endpoint/jargon exposure, viewer/runtime ref labeling, and disabled controls.

delegations.task_goal: Audit APP-239 Loom carrier, GitHub issue coverage, and PR readiness gaps.
delegations.validation_expectation: Classify carrier/GitHub/pre-review blockers and PR body requirements.
delegations.output_format: Blockers/non-blockers with commands, output summaries, and PR body coverage points.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller updates task carrier rows, evidence map, work-item artifacts, progress checkpoint, current pointer, bootstrap fact-chain, and validation summary.

delegations.task_goal: Review current-head APP-239 implementation for correctness, privacy, external-write, and read-only boundary blockers.
delegations.validation_expectation: Identify P0/P1/P2 semantic findings and residual risk.
delegations.output_format: Findings with file/line, impact, and minimal fix.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller records no P0/P1 blockers and routes two P2 findings to bounded worker repair.

delegations.task_goal: Fix APP-239 P2 review findings in disjoint App files.
delegations.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check
delegations.output_format: Changed paths, validation result, residual risk.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller integrates BOSS/failure smoke coverage and read-only-only Library CTA behavior into final APP-239 commit.

integration_evidence.summary: Per-run detail failure no longer falls back silently to older successful runs; app_action none no longer renders as action intent or failure recovery.
Task Thread now defaults to APP-239 read-only tasks, keeps selected Run controlled, distinguishes viewer/runtime refs, and disables out-of-scope controls.
APP-239 carrier rows cover #238-#242, current pointer and bootstrap fact-chain are bound to APP-239, and tool-surface blockers are recorded without being treated as App product failures.
Current-head review found no P0/P1 blockers. Two P2 issues were accepted: BOSS/failure smoke coverage and read-only-only Library CTA behavior.
Smoke now covers BOSS live Core projection and non-none failure recovery; Library detail CTA now only launches APP-239 read-only task ids and disables write-pre related tasks.
